creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
I can't compile net/openafs on 9-RC1


fot gcc:
.....
/usr/ports/net/openafs/work/openafs-1.6.0/src/afs/afs_server.c: In function 'afsi_SetServerIPRank':
/usr/ports/net/openafs/work/openafs-1.6.0/src/afs/afs_server.c:1204: error: 'struct in_ifaddr' has no member named 'ia_netmask'
/usr/ports/net/openafs/work/openafs-1.6.0/src/afs/afs_server.c:1204: error: 'struct in_ifaddr' has no member named 'ia_net'
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/openafs/work/openafs-1.6.0/src/libafs/MODLOAD.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/openafs/work/openafs-1.6.0/src/libafs.




clang:
.....
clang: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-e lf'
clang: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-mno-align-long-strings'
/usr/ports/net/openafs/work/openafs-1.6.0/src/afs/afs_server.c:1204:34: error: no member named 'ia_netmask' in 'struct in_ifaddr'; did you
      mean 'ia_subnetmask'?
    if ((ntohl(sa->sa_ip) & ifa->ia_netmask) == ifa->ia_net) {
                                 ^~~~~~~~~~
                                 ia_subnetmask
./netinet/in_var.h:65:9: note: 'ia_subnetmask' declared here
        u_long  ia_subnetmask;          /* mask of subnet */
                ^
/usr/ports/net/openafs/work/openafs-1.6.0/src/afs/afs_server.c:1204:54: error: no member named 'ia_net' in 'struct in_ifaddr'
    if ((ntohl(sa->sa_ip) & ifa->ia_netmask) == ifa->ia_net) {
                                                ~~~  ^
2 errors generated.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/openafs/work/openafs-1.6.0/src/libafs/MODLOAD.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/openafs/work/openafs-1.6.0/src/libafs.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Try to install net/openafs on 9-RC1
